violations.text: Receiving door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
Boxes of candy/foods were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Space observed at the side of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Boxes of candy were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy reach-in shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
